resultList.dtldesc: This luxurious 4 BHK villa offers an exceptional residential opportunity within the prestigious Phoenix Luxury Park II development in Shamshabad. Set in a rapidly developing area of South Hyderabad, this property is designed for those who seek a sophisticated lifestyle away from the urban clamour while maintaining excellent connectivity. The residence stands out for its grand architectural design, spacious layout, and its proximity to the international airport, making it a premier choice for discerning homeowners and frequent travellers alike.::::Property Specifications::::The villa encompasses a substantial super area of 3,936 sq. ft, offering an expansive and airy living environment. This West-facing property features four well-appointed bedrooms and five modern bathrooms, ensuring maximum comfort for all residents. The layout includes four additional rooms, providing versatile spaces for a puja room, store, study, and a servant room. As an unfurnished, under-construction property, it offers a blank canvas for owners to customise the interiors according to their personal preferences. The villa is part of a freehold project and overlooks a beautifully landscaped park, garden, and the pool area, situated along a wide 40m main road.::::Facilities::::Phoenix Luxury Park II is equipped with an impressive array of world-class facilities designed to enhance the quality of life. Residents benefit from a 3-tier security system, 24/7 maintenance staff, and full power backup. The project features a unique clubhouse, a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and an aerobics room. Modern infrastructure such as piped gas, solar energy systems, and high-speed internet connectivity are seamlessly integrated. For recreation, the community offers a private terrace/garden, a meditation area, an activity deck, and an arts and craft studio. Sustainable living is prioritised through rain water harvesting and efficient waste disposal systems.::::Locality::::Situated in the Mamidpally area of Shamshabad, the property enjoys a strategic location with effortless access to the Rajiv Gandhi International Airport. The neighbourhood is becoming a significant commercial and residential hub, with landmarks like Safran Electrical & Power India and Cyient DLM within close proximity. Families will appreciate the access to educational institutions such as Euro Kids and healthcare services at Arkan Superspeciality Hospitals. The locality is well-connected via the Shamshabad Bus Stop and Umdanagar Railway Station, ensuring smooth commutes to the Gachibowli IT corridor and other parts of Hyderabad. With local markets and commercial centres nearby, the area offers a perfectly balanced urban living experience.
